title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Tata Memorial Centre

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Tata Memorial Centre
jsonLd.description:
Tata Memorial Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Memorial Centre:
Tata Memorial Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre!
